acceptance_targets: [chapter_11_prose_001] In the revised chapter, the cited passages no longer present more than two uses total of the `as if/as though` explanatory construction across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:5, :61, :135, :291, :313, and :377, and each rewritten line still conveys the same social pressure by readable image or action rather than by comparative paraphrase.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised chapter, the cited passages no longer present more than two uses total of the `as if/as though` explanatory construction across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:5, :61, :135, :291, :313, and :377, and each rewritten line still conveys the same social pressure by readable image or action rather than by comparative paraphrase.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on the same explanatory `as if/as though` comparison structure often enough that it starts to read as a house sentence rather than a fresh choice. Because many of these clauses do the same interpretive work that the surrounding image already implies, the repetition slightly flattens an otherwise sharp prose surface.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the repeated comparison beats in the affected spans so at least several of them land through direct image, action, or syntax instead of another `as if/as though` gloss: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:61, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:135, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:291, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:313, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:377. Keep the strongest one or two if needed, but vary the sentence architecture so those moments stop stacking into a detectable formula.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the absurdity and cruelty of graduate labor without converting the book into caricature or chase-plot menace. In edge cases, prefer the messier and more compromising version of events if it yields stronger human consequence and remains causally plausible; render sex, professional theft, bureaucratic harm, and emotional pettiness with the same specificity as any technical problem.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns vague at the exact point humiliation, erotic charge, class shame, visa fear, or institutional cruelty becomes concrete, rewrite until the cost is materially and socially legible.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High; contractions are the baseline in speech, and uncontracted forms should appear only for deliberate precision, class performance, emotional emphasis, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public and private pressure, ensemble chapters and solitary ones, bureaucratic scenes and domestic scenes, deadline compression and aftermath inventory, so no two adjacent chapters rely on the same structural rhythm or dialogue density.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary literary English grounded in material detail; technical language should appear only when the social reality of the lab requires it, and it should never replace bodily or relational consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person centered on Leela, with occasional brief widenings that register group mood and institutional atmosphere without leaving her interpretive frame.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed observational lines with longer accrual sentences that can carry comedy, shame, and procedural dread in the same movement; quiet chapters should breathe, deadline chapters should tighten without turning telegraphic.
